defaults.hook_text: MESSI BATHED HIM AS A BABY
defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close up of Lamine Yamal's face celebrating in a Barcelona jersey, his face filling the frame, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: The famous 2007 charity photo where a baby Lamine Yamal was bathed by Lionel Messi, and how that baby grew up to become Barcelona's next superstar
videos.video_script: This baby being bathed by Messi grew up to be Lamine Yamal. It was a charity photo back in 2007. Nobody knew he'd become Barcelona's next superstar. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Lamine Yamal Barcelona goal celebration close up, Lamine Yamal Spain national team celebration, Lamine Yamal dribbling past defenders, Lamine Yamal scoring a goal close up, Lamine Yamal Barcelona jersey close up, Lamine Yamal Euro 2024 celebration, Lamine Yamal skill move on the pitch, Lamine Yamal intense face during a match, Lamine Yamal running with the ball, Lamine Yamal next Messi Barcelona
